entities.name: Quality Standards
entities.context: Framework defining standards for review and processing quality

entities.name: Review Depth
entities.context: Principle emphasizing substantive processing over superficial checkbox review

entities.name: Pattern Recognition
entities.context: Technique for cross-session synthesis of information

entities.name: Decision Facilitation
entities.context: Approach focused on generating frameworks rather than simple lists

entities.name: Contradiction Reconciliation
entities.context: Practice of genuine resolution attempts when conflicts arise

entities.name: Cross-session Synthesis
entities.context: Technique for recognizing patterns across multiple sessions

relationships.context: Review Depth is a component of Quality Standards
Pattern recognition is a quality indicator for review depth
Decision facilitation is a quality indicator for review depth
Contradiction reconciliation is a quality indicator for review depth
Cross-session synthesis is how pattern recognition is achieved
